tasks.name: kimi-ipo-date
tasks.goal: Notify me when there is credible news about Kimi or Moonshot AI IPO timing, official filing schedule, listing exchange, or prospectus progress.
tasks.criteria: Only notify when the result strongly suggests an IPO timeline, listing plan, exchange filing, prospectus, or official company statement. Suppress weak speculation.

queryPlan.summary: This search plan focuses on acquiring credible news related to the IPO timeline of Kimi or Moonshot AI. The queries are tailored to capture announcements about filing schedules, listing exchanges, and official statements that are specific to this context.

queries.reason: To capture any official announcements regarding the IPO date.
To track any updates related to the IPO filing schedule for Moonshot AI.
To find news specifically mentioning the prospectus, indicating progress on the IPO.
To identify information about which exchange Moonshot AI may list on.
To collect any direct statements from the company regarding their IPO plans.
